node.description:
He is one of the fourth group of subordinates to be named by Rimuru Tempest. As the right-hand man of the deceased Orc Lord, he was given the same name as him, as a memento and token of appreciation, similar to how Rigur was named after his older brother.

As an Orc King, he is the leader of the Yellow Corps, that acts as both the last line of defense for Tempest as well as the main team of the country's Department of Construction and Manufacturing. Later on, he was given the Title of a "Lord" as one of Rimuru's Twelve Patrons.

Orthos was the true king of the Kingdom of Filtwood. He was a Demon who was thought to be sealed away by a champion named Orthos, but that story was either entirely fabricated, or the demon managed to kill, and later impersonate the champion.

__Height__: 180 cm (Kijin), 190 cm (Ogre)

Souei is an Ogre that was among the third group of subordinates to be named by Rimuru Tempest. He is Rimuru's faithful shadow and the leader of the Shadow Squad of the Jura Tempest Federation.

Gido is a member of Cabal's Party who serves as the 'thief' role. ~!However, he is actually serving as one of the bodyguards of Lady Elyune secretly while under the guise of an adventurer.!~

(Source: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken Wikia)
A member of a group of children who were incompletely summoned. Kenya is the leader of the pack and has a lively disposition.

Species: Dwarf
Blessing / Divine Protection: Divine Protector of Ancestor
Title: King of Armament Nation Dwargon.
The king of Dwargon, Gazel Dwargo, the third generation king of Dwargon, but possesses a similar aura to that of his grandfather in his younger days. He is renowned as a great hero and celebrated as a wise king for his impartial rule.
He is the captain of the guards of Dwargon, and Kaijin's younger brother.
He is a junior at the same company where Satoru Mikami worked at. The two also went to the same university. He is Miho Sawatari's fiancé.
"Sky Queen" Frey is an ex-Demon Lord and currently a subordinate of Demon Lord Milim Nava. She often scolds Milim for playing around when she is supposed to be working.
Souka's subordinate. She forms part of the Shadow Squad, where she mostly gathers information. She used to live in the Lizardmen marshes but moved to Tempest by Abiru's order.
She is a resident of the goblin village.
Souka's subordinate. He forms part of the Shadow Squad, where he mostly gathers information. He used to live in the Lizardmen marshes but moved to Tempest by Abiru's order.
Souka's subordinate. She forms part of the Shadow Squad, where she mostly gathers information. She used to live in the Lizardmen marshes but moved to Tempest by Abiru's order.
Leon Cromwell is a former hero and a current Demon Lord of the Eight-pointed Star Octagram. He is the ruler of El Dorado, an island nation located south-west of the world.
Souka's subordinate. He forms part of the Shadow Squad, where he mostly gathers information. He used to live in the Lizardmen marshes but moved to Tempest by Abiru's order.

Ifrit is a high-ranking spirit; the ruler of flame which was sealed within Shizue Izawa by Demon Lord Leon Cromwell. He used to live in Dwelling of the Spirit before he was stolen by the "Blonde Demon" Leon Cromwell. After that, he was sealed within Shizue Izawa. As a result of this, it gave Shizue an extended lifespan.
A Goblin in Tempest thats friends with Gobuta

Ririna is one of the 400 Goblins that migrated to Rimuru's Goblin Village while he was away in Dwargon. After being named by Rimuru, she evolved to a Goblina. She is entrusted by him to manage Tempest's production affair as its supervisor.
